basics.name: Kanika Bansal
basics.title: Data Analyst @ SRHU | Former Research Intern @ RBI
basics.summary: Reserve Bank of India has provided opportunities to contribute to research initiatives, leveraging statistical programming and data analysis skills. As a Research Intern, supported statistical modeling projects and collaborated on data-driven decision-making processes. Educational background in Statistics from CCS University underpins a strong analytical foundation. Pursued a Master's degree in Statistics while developing competencies in tools such as Jupyter Notebook and programming languages like Python and R. Passionate about uncovering actionable insights through data, with a focus on adaptability and continuous learning. Aspires to contribute meaningfully in roles that prioritize innovation and analytical rigor.

experience.company: JVMGRR Instt. of Computer Application, Ch. Dadri

education.degree: Bachelor of Science - BS, Data Science and Applications
Bachelor's degree, Mathematics and Computer Science

certifications: Analyzing and Visualizing Data with Microsoft Power BI
